1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Helse-innovasjon: – Gledelig å se at flere selskaper kommer ut fra OUS</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocapitalize="off" autocomplete="off" autocorrect="off" name="q" placeholder="Hva søker du etter?" spellcheck="false" type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocapitalize="off" autocomplete="off" autocorrect="off" name="q" placeholder="Hva søker du etter?" spellcheck="false" type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocapitalize="off" autocomplete="off" autocorrect="off" name="q" placeholder="Hva søker du etter?" spellcheck="false" type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-label="Lukk" class="BackDrop_backdrop__pInKL" style="z-index:var(--backdrop-z-index)" tabindex="-1"></button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocapitalize="off" autocomplete="off" autocorrect="off" name="q" placeholder="Hva søker du etter?" spellcheck="false" type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Page has no main landmark

<body>

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocapitalize="off" autocomplete="off" autocorrect="off" name="q" placeholder="Hva søker du etter?" spellcheck="false" type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocapitalize="off" autocomplete="off" autocorrect="off" name="q" placeholder="Hva søker du etter?" spellcheck="false" type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Canvas element has no text alternative

<canvas class="canvasNode" style="width:100%;height:100%"></canvas>
Add aria-label or fallback text content inside canvas
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Eventlokaler</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (18 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocapitalize="off" autocomplete="off" autocorrect="off" name="q" placeholder="Hva søker du etter?" spellcheck="false" type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocapitalize="off" autocomplete="off" autocorrect="off" name="q" placeholder="Hva søker du etter?" spellcheck="false" type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocapitalize="off" autocomplete="off" autocorrect="off" name="q" placeholder="Hva søker du etter?" spellcheck="false" type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Søk — Forskningsparken

https://www.forskningsparken.no/search?q=Teknologi&tag=technology
Avvik: 19 | Bestått: 38
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="Footer_title__7ywZX">Åpningstider</h3>

<body>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocapitalize="off" autocomplete="off" autocorrect="off" name="q" placeholder="Hva søker du etter?" spellcheck="false" type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

<body>
